title: Building trust online: Commpair helps Oudtshoorn brands stand out
description: BUSINESS NEWS - From legal practices to...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - From legal practices to coffee shops, Oudtshoorn’s leading businesses are establishing their online presence with the help of Commpair.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - From legal practices to coffee shops, Oudtshoorn’s leading businesses are establishing their online presence with the help of Commpair."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In today’s digital landscape, a professional website is no longer a luxury, it’s a necessity.","html":"In today’s digital landscape, a professional website is no longer a luxury, it’s a necessity."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Commpair, a proudly local company, specialises in fully managed websites designed to enhance visibility and build trust online."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We handle every aspect, from design and hosting to SEO, mobile optimisation and booking systems, so our clients can focus on what they do best: running their business,” says the Commpair team.Trusted by Oudtshoorn businesses like:","html":"“We handle every aspect, from design and hosting to SEO, mobile optimisation and booking systems, so our clients can focus on what they do best: running their business,” says the Commpair team.

Trusted by Oudtshoorn businesses like:"},{"type":"list","items":["Duvenage Keyser & Jonck Attorneys: a professional firm now with a clean, modern online presence","Enchanted Coffee Shop: bringing more customers through Google and mobile ordering","GasIt Oudtshoorn: now receiving product enquiries directly through their online catalogue"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These aren’t one-size-fits-all websites. Commpair offers a wide range of custom-built packages to suit each business’s needs and budget from R100 per month for a starter landing page, to advanced e-commerce or multi-page service sites.","html":"These aren’t one-size-fits-all websites. Commpair offers a wide range of custom-built packages to suit each business’s needs and budget from R100 per month for a starter landing page, to advanced e-commerce or multi-page service sites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What you get with Commpair:","html":"What you get with Commpair:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mobile-friendly, Google-optimised websites","Free hosting, monthly updates, and AI tools","Booking systems, online orders, client chat, and more","Unlimited changes and upgrades as your business grows","Transparent monthly pricing with no hidden fees"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From solo entrepreneurs to large, multi-branch operations, there's a solution tailored for every setup.","html":"From solo entrepreneurs to large, multi-branch operations, there's a solution tailored for every setup."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ready to grow online?","html":"Ready to grow online?"},{"type":"list","items":["Visit: www.commpair.co.za","WhatsApp: 064 651 1145","Email: [email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Local support. No call centres. Just real results.","html":"Local support. No call centres. Just real results."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
